dsl_rule.translation_notes: Used Donchian Channel indicators (dc_upper, dc_lower, dc_middle) to represent n-period highest high and lowest low breakouts with lookback_period_n=50. Entry requires breakout close + confirmation from prior bar close direction. Exit when price reverts to channel middle, representing return inside the channel. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to support both long and short breakout trades.

backtest_rule.reason: Used Donchian Channel indicators (dc_upper, dc_lower, dc_middle) to represent n-period highest high and lowest low breakouts with lookback_period_n=50. Entry requires breakout close + confirmation from prior bar close direction. Exit when price reverts to channel middle, representing return inside the channel. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to support both long and short breakout trades.

source_rule_text: A trader should use channel-breakout operators to filter noise and identify the current trend direction in a time series before entering trend-following trades.
